name: Close

composio_registry_match.name: Close
composio_registry_match.description: Close is a CRM platform designed to help businesses manage and streamline their sales processes, including calling, email automation, and predictive dialers.

description: A sales CRM platform that integrates calling, email, SMS, and pipeline management with an embedded AI agent named Chloe for automated lead qualification and follow-up.
notes: Close provides a robust REST API and explicitly mentions an official MCP server on their developer page. API key authentication is the industry standard for their REST API.
